exam_price_notes: $93 exam fee + ~$30 test center fee. Fee waivers for military/low-income.
target_audience: Students who have completed one to two years of college Spanish language study
recommended_experience: Material taught during both years is incorporated into a single exam, covering both Level 1 and Level 2 content

prerequisites.description: Students who have completed one to two years of college Spanish language study

retake_policy.notes: Each institution reserves the right to set its own credit-granting policy, which may differ from the American Council on Education (ACE). Contact your college to find out the score required for credit and the number of credit hours granted.

objectives.title: Listening comprehension through short oral exchanges
sub_objectives: Choose the response that most logically continues or completes each conversation

objectives.title: Listening comprehension through longer spoken selections
sub_objectives: Answer questions based on dialogues, announcements, and narratives
Select part of a graphic, fill out a table, or put a list in the correct order

objectives.title: Discrete sentences (vocabulary and structure)
sub_objectives: Select the best completion for each incomplete statement

objectives.title: Short cloze passages (vocabulary and structure)
sub_objectives: Choose the best completion for each blank in the context of the entire paragraph

objectives.title: Reading passages and authentic stimulus materials (reading comprehension)
sub_objectives: Answer questions, incomplete statements, or commands based on selections

official_study_resources.title: CLEP Spanish Language and Spanish with Writing Examination Guide
official_study_resources.notes: This guide provides practice questions for the CLEP Spanish Language (Levels 1 and 2) and Spanish with Writing (Levels 1 and 2) Exams.

official_study_resources.title: Spanish Language Released Exam
official_study_resources.notes: Official CLEP Released Exams are the next best thing to taking the real CLEP exam from examIam.

official_study_resources.title: What Your CLEP Score Means
official_study_resources.notes: Guide to understanding how CLEP scores are calculated and credit-granting recommendations for all exams.

official_study_resources.title: ACE Credit Recommendations
official_study_resources.notes: Recommendations for credit-granting scores from the American Council on Education.
